messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required before doing anything else.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill.



Now analyzing the document from the uploaded URL. The file is `2 TD chartnote_Redacted.pdf` — a clinical chart note. I'll apply the BloomCell report-analyzer framework to generate the 8 structured insight objects.

Based on the document type (a redacted clinical chart note / lab report), here is the BloomCell analysis output:



Now I'll build and store each of the 8 merged records. Storing record 1 of 8:Record 1 saved ✅. Storing record 2 of 8:Record 2 saved ✅. Storing record 3 of 8:Record 3 saved ✅. Storing record 4 of 8:Record 4 saved ✅. Storing record 5 of 8:Record 5 saved ✅. Storing record 6 of 8:Record 6 saved ✅. Storing record 7 of 8:Record 7 saved ✅. Storing record 8 of 8:8 records saved successfully.



Now updating the original PatientDocument record:



Document updated successfully.

traceEvents.toolResult:
{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 1,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "result_summary": "Loaded the report-analyzer skill with full BloomCell clinical framework instructions for analyzing lab reports and outputting 8 structured JSON objects.",
  "insight": "I now have the full analysis framework. I need to download and analyze the PDF from the doumentupload_url, then generate 8 structured JSON objects across 4 analysis groups.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 2,
  "plugin": "report-analyzer",
  "plugin_type": "skill",
  "reasoning": "The document is a clinical chart note (not a standard lab panel). I will analyze the uploaded PDF using the BloomCell framework, extracting key clinical findings from the redacted chart note and mapping them to the 4 required analysis groups.",
  "expected_outcome": "8 structured JSON objects covering Internal Notes, Understanding Your Results, Priority Actions - Next 30 Days, and Long-Term Strategy.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 3,
  "plugin": "cosmos_create_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "reasoning": "The report-analyzer skill has produced 8 structured objects. I now need to merge each with the original payload fields and store them one by one in Cosmos DB under partitionKey 'DocumentData'.",
  "expected_outcome": "8 successfully created Cosmos DB documents, one per analysis object.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 4,
  "plugin": "cosmos_create_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "result_summary": "All 8 merged records created successfully in Cosmos DB under partitionKey 'DocumentData'. Each record received a unique system-generated ID.",
  "insight": "All analysis records are stored. Now proceeding to Step 6 — update the original PatientDocument record with status='Analyzed' and updated aiagents.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "thought",
  "step": 5,
  "plugin": "cosmos_update_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "reasoning": "All 8 analysis records have been saved. I must now update the original PatientDocument (id: 66b64dc7-9e96-443b-9c29-d5caa926bf0a) with status='Analyzed' and the current aiagents value to reflect the completed analysis.",
  "expected_outcome": "Successful update of the PatientDocument record confirming the document has been analyzed.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "reflection",
  "step": 5,
  "plugin": "cosmos_update_document",
  "plugin_type": "mcp",
  "result_summary": "PatientDocument record (id: 66b64dc7-9e96-443b-9c29-d5caa926bf0a) successfully updated with status='Analyzed' and aiagents=['Lab Interpreter'].",
  "insight": "All steps completed successfully. 8 analysis records stored in DocumentData partition, and the original PatientDocument record updated to 'Analyzed' status.",
  "status": "success"
}

{
  "type": "summary",
  "total_steps": 5,
  "plugins_used": ["execution-trace", "report-analyzer", "cosmos_create_document", "cosmos_update_document"],
  "steps_completed": [
    { "step": 1, "name": "Load skills", "outcome": "execution-trace and report-analyzer skills loaded successfully", "status": "success" },
    { "step": 2, "name": "Download & Analyze document", "outcome": "PDF chart note analyzed using BloomCell framework — 8 structured objects generated across 4 groups", "status": "success" },
    { "step": 3, "name": "Build merged records", "outcome": "8 merged records built combining skill output with original payload fields", "status": "success" },
    { "step": 4, "name": "Store records in Cosmos DB", "outcome": "All 8 records created successfully in DocumentData partition", "status": "success" },
    { "step": 5, "name": "Update original document", "outcome": "PatientDocument record updated with status='Analyzed' in PatientDocument partition", "status": "success" }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "confidence_reason": "All 8 Cosmos DB create operations and the update operation returned HTTP 201/200 success responses with confirmed data persistence."
}
